skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem: A delivery truck traveled on the freeway and on city streets to complete a route of 220 miles. The trip took 5 hours. The truck traveled at an average speed of 65 miles per hour (mph) on the freeway and an average speed of 30 mph on city streets. If x is the time, in hours, the truck traveled on the freeway and y is the time, in hours, it traveled on city streets, which system of equations represents this situation?
rationale: Total distance equals the sum of the distances on the freeway (65x) and on city streets (30y), so 65x + 30y = 220. Total time equals x + y = 5. Choice D matches. The correct answer is choice D.
